title: crataegus monogyna var. media
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. media, also known as Midway Hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its compact growth and mid-green, lobed leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Midway Hawthorn include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Midway Hawthorn can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
